title: Travel Request Form — Non-Title III / COMP 01 (DocuSign)
content: DocuSign form for requesting grant-funded travel paid from Non-Title III (COMP 01) sources at Morgan State University. As of 2024-05-30 the 'Grant/Award End Date' field is mandatory. Consult the University Travel website for related policies (allowable per diem, lodging caps, justification, advance approval). Submit via DocuSign to the MSU ORA signing group; questions to ora-docusign@morgan.edu.
